title: Rafael's Cycle Devices
description: Master the elements of time and weather with Rafael's Cycle Devices! This mod introduces two powerful tools: the Weather Cycle Device and the Time Cycle Device. Seamlessly control the weather or shift between day and night with ease.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/831931824d61d3f0370c794b90f6c55c77b91c50.png)

Change the elements of your world with ease!

Rafael's Cycle Devices is a Minecraft mod that introduces two powerful gadgets: the Weather Cycle Device and the Time Cycle Device. These devices allow players to control time and weather effortlessly, making them perfect for adventurers, builders, and survivalists alike.

# 🌍 Supported Versions
Minecraft: 1.21, 1.21.1, 1.21.2, 1.21.3, 1.21.4

Languages: English, Azerbaijani, Italian

# 🌀 Weather Cycle Device
Tired of sudden thunderstorms ruining your day? The Weather Cycle Device lets you toggle between sunny skies, pouring rain, and epic thunderstorms with a single right-click.

### Weather States
- 🌞 Sunny: Perfect for exploring and building.
- 🌧️ Rainy: Bring water to your crops or add a calm atmosphere.
- ⚡ Thunderstorm: Summon dramatic weather for your adventures!

Simply craft the device and take control of the elements!

# ⏳ Time Cycle Device
Is it night and you forgot to light up your build? No worries! The Time Cycle Device allows you to shift between day, night, and midnight in the blink of an eye.

### Time States
- 🌅 Day: Begin your journey bright and early.
- 🌌 Night: Enjoy peaceful starlit skies.
- 🌙 Midnight: Bask in the tranquility of the moon’s glow.

# 🛠️ Crafting Recipes
### Weather Cycle Device :
![Crafting Recipe of Weather Cycle Device](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2103b3d33c4e12d2490a258c6d384185e931b638.png)
### Time Cycle Device
![Crafting Recipe of Time Cycle Device](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/302cf8fec4e0af16c2480f4252bfebb12c50f90d.png)
# 🌟 Features
- Intuitive controls: Right-click to activate!
- Cooldown mechanics: Devices include cooldowns to prevent overuse.
- Visual feedback: Custom messages keep you informed of changes.

# 🌎 Localization
Help us expand Rafael's Cycle Devices to more languages! Contribute translations through [Localization](https://crowdin.com/project/rafaels-cycle-devices).
